---
title: 'waiting player not displayed on host sessionList page.'
---

# Steps to reproduce

As a host, create a session
Share the code with a participant

As a participant join the session using the given code.

## Actual

As a host from the sessionList page, on the open session, it displays 0 players.

## Expected

As a host from the sessionList page, on the open session, it displays 1 player(s).
